findings.message: New pydantic field `widget_timeout_s` (env var `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S` under the `APP_` prefix) is consumed by Settings but is not declared in `.env.example`. The framework-managed surface in `.env.example` declares APP_ENVIRONMENT, APP_LOG_LEVEL, APP_SLO_*, APP_DATABASE_URL, and APP_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL, but has no entry for this new variable. A consumed-but-undeclared variable breaks DEV->CI->STAGE->PROD env-var parity: operators have no documented knob to override the timeout per environment.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S=5.0` (with a brief comment) to the framework-managed block of `.env.example` so the variable is discoverable and overridable across all environments.
